text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The challenge of the Classics begins this year. I
decide to watch some TV to see what our
competition looks like.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
We have quite an interesting line up for the
Classics this year.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
We have the peerless Sakura Bakushin O in the
sprints. Rice Shower has also announced her
intentions to compete, but...

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
There's no way she can beat Mihono Bourbon,
who can potentially become the Triple Crown
champion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Mihono Bourbon is leagues ahead
of the other racers who debuted last year.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Hi, Big Brother.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Hi, Big Sister.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah. It's me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. I wanted to come and wish you a happy
New Year... Am I interrupting something?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah... that's good.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Anyway, I talked to Urara this morning.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
She said she was going to make a New Year's
resolution... and then she asked if resolutions are
yummy.
choice_data_list: I... don't think they're very tasty.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Haha, me neither. That's what I told her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, anyway...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping that we could make our resolution
for this year together...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping that we could make our resolutions
for this year together...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Unless... you don't want to...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, yay! Now, what should my goal be?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...What about you? What's your goal for this
year?
choice_data_list:
To make you a racer worthy of competing
against Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...What about you? What's your goal for this
year?
choice_data_list:
To make you a racer worthy of competing
against Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Actually...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Is it okay if I make my goal the same as yours?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Then it's decided.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm going to do my best to achieve our goal.
choice_data_list: That's what I like to hear!
Be sure to keep your health in mind too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm going to do my best to achieve our goal.
choice_data_list: That's what I like to hear!
Be sure to keep your health in mind too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Right! I might not do well at first, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I won't ever give up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, Rice Shower makes a new vow.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It would be just my luck to catch a cold before a race.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And I don't want to miss out on training with
you...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And I don't want to miss out on training with
you...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh, I'll just have to be perfectly healthy
forever and ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing the panic in her voice start to rise, I
quickly work to calm her down while we make a
training plan together.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Ehehe. You're kind of like a teacher.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Ehehe. You're kind of like a teacher.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Heehee... I'm looking forward to your next
lesson... Teacher.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Rice Shower and I watch some race
footage together to study up on Mihono
Bourbon.
